sglang.title: Add constrained_json_whitespace_pattern to ServerArgs
sglang.author: zifeitong
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
CC @qeternity @max99x
Motivation
It's hard to find a single whitespace pattern that works for all models(see dottxt-ai/outlines#691). I think it's better to leave the choice to the users.
Related PR: #1277
Modifications
constrained_json_whitespace_pattern is added to ServerArgs with the default valu

sglang.title: Simplify sampler and its error handling
sglang.author: merrymercy

vllm.title: [Kernel] Enable 8-bit weights in Fused Marlin MoE
vllm.author: ElizaWszola
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR covers the remaining work of PR #7079 . It enables 8-bit weights in the fused Marlin kernel without modifying the codepaths that run the kernel and also adds 8-bit tests to test_moe.py.
Tested e2e by running offline_inference.py with
llm = LLM(model="nm-testing/Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct-v0.1-W8A

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix clean shutdown issues
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We continue to have issues with shutdown/cleanup, especially in multi-process cases. This is a new attempt to make cleanup work more reliably.
Should cover the various combinations of distributed inference backends / decoupled front-end process, both SIGTERM and SIGINT when running the API server, b

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Kernel] Fix build for sm_60 in GGUF kernel
vllm.author: sasha0552
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#8357 breaks the build for sm_60 due to forgotten__CUDA_ARCH__ >= 610 (because __dp4a is not available for sm_60). This PR fixes this.
https://github.com/sasha0552/pascal-pkgs-ci/actions/runs/10876679330/job/30176934969

This PR adds kernels for asymmetric quantization of activations. Tests are included.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Bind api server port before starting engine
vllm.author: kevin314
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Potential alternate solution for #8204--I saw that asyncio will use a default port of 0 in the context of create_server() if no port is given in the config. Binding to port 0 with socket.socket.bind() apparently means the OS will pick an available port for you, which I think functions similarly to g

vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The tests have been failed to kick off last several days due to waiting for image, but the images were built successfully. Adding this flag to investigate

vllm.title: [misc] small qol fixes for release process
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt: I have been keeping these at local branch when doing releases.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix 3.12 builds on main
vllm.author: joerunde
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
It looks like triton imports setuptools at runtime, but does not itself specify that setuptools is a runtime requirement. This causes a problem when the version of setuptools installed is older, and expects the distutils package to exist, which was removed in python 3.12.
Fixes this: #8133 (comment)

vllm.title: [refactor] remove triton based sampler
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR reverts #3186 (but done manually given so much changes git cannot automatically revert). This code path has been unused and no follow up work has been planned.

vllm.title: [Frontend] Improve Nullable kv Arg Parsing
vllm.author: alex-jw-brooks
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In the CLI for engine arguments, we use a custom argparse type called nullable_kvs, which raises ValueError - the messages in the ValueError are helpful, but they don't actually get propagated to the user, because Argparse swallows them and throws a more generic error. Here's an example:
python -m v

vllm.title: [Misc][Bugfix] Disable guided decoding for mistral tokenizer
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently there's no clear indicator that guided decoding works with mistral tokenizer. This PR disables it in case of misuse.
FIX #8429
cc @patrickvonplaten

vllm.title: [torch.compile] register allreduce operations as custom ops
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
rework of #7755
instead of embedding the tp name in the op name, embed the group name into op's argument. this can naturally extend to future ops like allreduce in context parallel.
